data.body: Pass-1 db-migrations overlay: reviewed migration 0014_drop_old_after_backfill.py (op.drop_column("users","email_v1")). No finding — this is a correctly-gated contract step: the DROP is documented as sequenced after a completed expand (0011 added new col) + backfill (0012) + deploy (read from new col). Per the false-positive guards, destructiveness alone is not a defect when the expand+backfill+deploy sequence precedes it. Clean.
